catalog.browseDescription: Browse our carefully curated list of top-rated local spots. Whether you are looking for a quick bite, a healthy lunch, or a premium dinner, we deliver the best food in the city straight to your door, fast and fresh.

hero.descriptionLine1: Join the ultimate dining experience - where taste meets convenience. Your next
hero.descriptionLine2: culinary adventure is just a click away.

handpickedselection.title: Handpicked Selection
handpickedselection.description: We partner only with the best local kitchens and highly-rated chefs to guarantee a premium and delicious experience every time.

real-timetracking.title: Real-Time Tracking
real-timetracking.description: Track your order from the kitchen straight to your door. Fast, seamless, and perfectly tailored to your cravings.

24/7customersupport.title: 24/7 Customer Support
24/7customersupport.description: Hungry at 2 AM? We’ve got you covered. Our support team is always online to resolve any issues and ensure your food arrives hot.

sectionData.description: From local hidden gems to top-rated restaurants, we make ordering your favorite meals fast, fresh, and hassle-free. Discover new flavors with seamless delivery and round-the-clock support.

trending.heading: Trending Now
trending.description: From cozy local cafes to premium dining spots, discover the best places to satisfy your cravings right now.

about.content:
# About the FoodExpress Project

This application is developed as part of **Laboratory Works** for the discipline "Software Engineering" (SE)[cite: 4].

## Our Goal
Providing convenient food search and ordering, satisfying the needs of modern users for speed and service quality[cite: 35, 108].

## Development Team
According to the requirements for the composition of a small project[cite: 15], we distributed roles as follows:
* **Project Manager** — Denis (planning and coordination)[cite: 16].
* **Developer** — Bohdan (direct software development in JS)[cite: 17, 75].
* **UI/UX Designer** — formation of the graphic interface concept[cite: 18].

## Our User Profile
We focus on active people:
1. **Age**: 18-35 years[cite: 81].
2. **Location**: Ukraine[cite: 83].
3. **Goal**: quick satisfaction of nutritional needs[cite: 85].

## Technology Stack and Methodology
* **Language**: JavaScript (React + Vite)[cite: 75, 98].
* **Infrastructure**: GitHub, Trello, Google Drive[cite: 100, 102].
* **Development Methodology**: Incremental model[cite: 101].
